title: Templates
subtitle: Reusable snapshots used as the starting point of every sandbox.
noTemplates: No templates yet. Use the CLI or SDK to publish a template.

compat.banner: {{templates}} templates have {{replicas}} stale replicas after node environment changes and need rebuild.
compat.adoptConfirm: Use the current node versions as the new baseline for UNKNOWN replicas of this template? Only continue if you have verified the template works in the current environment.

create.title: New Template
create.writableLayerSizeHint: e.g. 1G, 2G. Required — the backend rejects empty values.
create.exposedPortsHint: Multiple ports separated by commas, e.g. 49983,9000.
create.exposedPortsError: Ports must be numbers between 1 and 65535.
create.probePathHint: Defaults to /health when probe port is set.
create.probeAutoSyncHint: Tip: when the Exposed ports field loses focus, the Probe port will auto-fill with the first port (if empty). Once you set a custom probe port, it won't be overwritten by later Exposed port edits.
create.networkTypeHint: e.g. tap. Leave empty to use the cluster default.
create.nodesHint: Limit distribution to these node IDs or host IPs (comma separated). Leave empty to let CubeMaster auto-pick from healthy nodes.
create.commandHint: Override the container ENTRYPOINT. One argument per line.
create.argsHint: Override the container CMD. One argument per line.
create.dnsHint: One server per line or comma separated.
create.allowOutHint: Allowed outbound CIDRs for the egress policy, one per line or comma separated.
create.denyOutHint: Denied outbound CIDRs for the egress policy, one per line or comma separated.
